notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Carson Williams to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Ryan Vilade. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser singles on a ground ball to third baseman Oliver Dunn.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, third baseman Blaze Alexander to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Chandler Simpson out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carson Williams GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carson Williams grounds into a double play, third baseman Blaze Alexander to second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Cedric Mullins out at 2nd. Carson Williams out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Chandler Simpson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chandler Simpson grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Hunter Feduccia out at 2nd. Chandler Simpson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes singles on a ground ball to third baseman Weston Wilson. Victor Mesa Jr. to 2nd.
